title: check: Skip detailed edge modeling if costly

features.name: part_select_feedback_in_shift_concatenation
features.description: Code should include an output assignment with a part-select used in a concatenation that feeds back through a shift operation, creating a potential logic loop

features.name: large_width_shift_cell_edge_data
features.description: Code should include a cell with large port widths where the product of input and output widths exceeds a threshold, causing quadratic explosion in edge modeling
